# PII detection patterns — shared between pre-commit hook and CI
# One extended regex per line. Lines starting with # are comments.
cody\.kickertz
ckickertz
[Kk]ickertz
summusglobal
Pflugerville
Baby #[0-9]
Pitman arm
due October 2026
192\.168\.0\.
\+1512[0-9]{7}
ardentleatherworks
Ardent LLC
Kendall.s birthday
